title: bromus rubens var. alexandrinus
intro: Bromus rubens var. alexandrinus, also known as Alexandrian brome or false brome, is a plant species in the grass family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Bromus rubens var. alexandrinus include its use as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention, and its ability to lower blood pressure due to its vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Bromus rubens var. alexandrinus include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
